citation: Rapini, A. and Jordanous, A. (2024). Beat Tracking for Salsa Music: Adapting and Benchmarking Models Using a Newly Introduced Salsa Dataset. Proc. 1st Latin American Music Information Retrieval Workshop (LAMIR), ISMIR.
notes: Protocol: 5-fold CV on SalsaSet, 10% validation from training fold, best val-loss checkpoint, F-measure at +/-70ms tolerance (Rapini & Jordanous 2024 Section 4).

BeatNet preprocessing discrepancy — paper text vs official implementation: Heydari et al. 2021 paper text states a Hann window of 93ms and hop size of 46ms (~22fps). The official BeatNet GitHub implementation ships with win=1408 samples (64ms) / hop=441 samples (20ms) = 50fps, and all published experimental results were produced with these parameters. We follow the official implementation (50fps) to match published numbers. The paper text discrepancy is likely a description of an earlier prototype.

BeatNet architecture: 1D Conv (2 filters, kernel 10) + MaxPool/2 + FC-150 + 2x unidirectional LSTM (150 units) + FC-3 + softmax. Training: Adam lr=5e-4, batch=200, 8-sec segments (400 frames at 50fps), weighted cross-entropy (inverse class frequency).
